month: This is a utilization report for supply teacher bookings only.
It does NOT represent staff headcount. Supply teachers are booked daily from the board pool and are NOT employees of Ridgewood.
Do not use these figures for the headcount reconciliation or the staffing freeze assessment.
The Flexible PD substitute coverage budget line in board_brief_budget.csv covers a subset of these costs (PD-related days only).
For the board brief headcount the authoritative sources are BambooHR (roster) and Gusto (payroll) and Okta (access accounts).
